headline: Hershey (NYSE:HSY): Strongest Q4 Results from the Shelf-Stable Food Group
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how shelf-stable food stocks fared in Q4, starting with Hershey (NYSE:HSY).
